homepage.title: Vaski
homepage.description: Level up with automation in flat bar processing and sheet metal handling with Vaski. Enhance efficiency, reduce waste, and revolutionize industrial manufacturing with our custom solutions. Subscribe to VaskiSTORIES for more.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Vaski
Level up with automation by Vaski
Vaski stands at the forefront in flat bar processing, optimised sheet metal handling and custom machines for various industrial needs. Level up with automation from Vaski.
Why Vaski?
Visit us at Vaski Group
Open House 2026
For more than a century, our heritage has shaped modern metal forming and today Vaski Group continues to set global benchmarks in flat bar and sheet metal processing. On
8–9 June 2026
, we open our doors to present live demonstrations, breakthrough technologies, and the next phase of our automation strategy across all three brands. Discover how the fastest sheet metal solutions, advanced busbar processing and large scale bending technologies are defining the future of manufacturing and see firsthand where the industry is heading next.
Sign up now!
Creating Efficiency
Vaski stands at the forefront of automation in flat bar processing, sheet metal handling systems and custom machines for various industrial applications. Our mission is to create efficiency and we strive to improve manufacturing.
Learn more about our solutions
VaskiPUNCH
Full punching automation with optimised workflow
One of the standout features in Vaski busbar processing is the implementation of all electric, high speed machinery. These machines not only cater to the increasing demands for energy efficiency but also maintain high reliability and production rates with the widest range of automation solutions available on the market.
VaskiPUNCH Series
Flat bar solutions
VaskiMULTICOIL
The fastest sheet metal handling with optimised waste
A modular range of blanking and slitting solutions from coiled sheet metal. The VaskiMULTICOIL delivers a significant leap forward in the efficiency and material utilisation in sheet metal processing.
VaskiMULTICOIL Series
Sheet metal solutions
Automation and Custom
Enhancing efficiency and delivering greater automation to industrial manufacturing with  customised solutions for a variety of metal processing applications. We love to provide solutions to metal manufacturing challenges where nobody else has.
Automation & Custom
Why choose Vaski?
Vaski specialises in delivering machinery and automation solutions designed to create efficiency for the future. Our solutions aim to redefine and simplify the rules of industrial manufacturing. Our passion for excellence is embedded in every machine we design.
Why Vaski?
Who we are for?
Vaski provides innovative solutions for flat bar processing, the largest market being busbar,  serving the power distribution and generation, charging station, e-mobility and data center markets.
Vaski also serves the sheet metal industry, the main markets being the  service center, subcontractor, construction materials, HVAC, steel furniture and racking sectors
with advanced blanking and slitting machines.
Learn more about our applications
Energy Solutions
Busbar Processing
Vaski is transforming the landscape of power distribution and generation through its innovative,

products.text:
Services
Vaski Service
Comprehensive support to you machinery needs
Contact us
Vaski Service
We provide local support in over 15 countries and have remote service support available 24/7. We are there for our customers whether they need to ramp up their production, a machine checkup, training, or quality spare parts. With tailored modernization and retrofit solutions, we can deliver better performance and extra lifetime for existing machines. Contact us:
services@vaski.com
Remote Support
Industry 4.0-enabled Vaski machines feature remote support for troubleshooting and updates, along with 24/7 teleservice for quick resolution of breakdowns.
Spares
Vaski provides original spare parts and reconditioning services, including grinding shear and slitting blades, to ensure optimal performance and reduce costs. Our on-site machine shop facilitates efficient part reconditioning.
Field Service
Service Check-Ups and Consultation by technical experts
Consultancy & Training
Vaski offers training and consultancy services, including operator training, programming, maintenance, and production support.
Ask us more - we are happy to help!
Our global sales network helps you find the right solutions. Locate your nearest contact or reach out to us directly.
Contact us
